sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IShares Russell 2000 ETF Options Spot-On: On June 30th, 1.97 Million Contracts Were Traded, With 9.57 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: This article highlights the significant trading activity for iShares Russell 2000 ETF (IWM) options on June 30th, noting that 1.97 million contracts were traded. It also mentions a substantial open interest of 9.57 million contracts, indicating strong investor engagement.

feed.title: Samsara (NYSE: IOT) officer’s 10b5-1 sale leaves 425,080 shares held
feed.summary: Samsara Inc. officer Adam Eltoukhy sold 2,039 shares of Class A Common Stock at $32.08 per share under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following the transaction, Eltoukhy holds 425,080 shares directly and 150,786 shares indirectly through the ES Trust, with additional holdings in restricted stock units. This sale, valued at $65,411, is documented in a Form 4 SEC filing.

feed.title: Infosys has not closed below this level in six years; Analysts warn of guidance cuts
feed.summary: Infosys shares have fallen below ₹1,000, a level not seen in six years, marking a 38% decline in the first half of 2026. Analysts anticipate the company will cut the upper end of its FY27 revenue growth guidance due to weakening demand and the premium valuation of Indian IT stocks compared to global peers. Despite this, Infosys is expected to maintain its FY27 operating margin guidance.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands stock hits 52-week low at 45.9 USD
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) stock recently hit a 52-week low of $45.90, though its current price is slightly above this at $46.07. The stock has seen a 28% decline over the past six months and a 4.16% drop over the last year. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued with significant upside potential.

feed.title: Blackbird.AI Is Positioned As A Market Shaper by Gartner® In The Emerging Market Quadrant for Narrative Intelligence - Startup Vendors as of June 2026
feed.summary: Blackbird.AI has been recognized by Gartner as a Market Shaper in 'The Emerging Market Quadrant for Narrative Intelligence - Startup Vendors as of June 2026'. The company achieved the highest placement for Potential to Execute and furthest to the right for Potential for Market Disruption, validating its advanced narrative intelligence detection and agentic response systems. This recognition highlights Blackbird.AI's role in protecting organizations from disinformation-based narrative attacks and transforming corporate security strategies.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on S&P Global to $490 From $539, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reduced its price target for S&P Global (SPGI) to $490 from $539, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite recent positive news for S&P Global, including the completion of its Mobility Global Division separation. The article also provides a company profile, financial data, and analyst consensus information for S&P Global.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Rockwell Automation PT to $527 From $470, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Baird has raised its price target for Rockwell Automation (NYSE:ROK) to $527 from $470, while reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook on the company's performance and market position. Rockwell Automation also recently announced several new product launches and initiatives, along with being added to multiple Russell 1000 indexes.

feed.title: 7 Sam's Club Perks Costco Members Might Envy in 2026
feed.summary: Sam's Club is increasingly focusing on technology and convenience features to differentiate itself from Costco. Perks like Scan & Go, curbside pickup, and extensive app functionality are designed to save members time, appealing to those who prioritize efficiency in their shopping experience. While Costco maintains its traditional appeal, Sam's Club's investments in digital tools and services offer a compelling alternative for convenience-seeking shoppers.

feed.title: Gartner calls Tenable the front-runner in AI exposure assessment
feed.summary: Tenable (NASDAQ: TENB) has been identified by Gartner as "the company to beat" for AI-powered exposure assessment in a recent June 2026 report. Gartner highlighted Tenable's strong position due to its vulnerability assessment history, attack surface discovery capabilities, and effective AI strategy, particularly through its Tenable One platform which covers various IT environments including emerging AI surfaces. The report also notes Tenable's recent AI milestones, such as the launch of Tenable Hexa AI and participation in Anthropic's Project Glasswing and OpenAI's Daybreak Cyber Partner Program.

feed.title: Corporater Named as a Sample Vendor in the Gartner® Hype Cycle™ for Enterprise Architecture 2026
feed.summary: Corporater, a provider of GPRC platforms, has been recognized as a Sample Vendor in the Gartner Hype Cycle for Enterprise Architecture 2026 within the Digital Twin of an Organization (DTO) Platforms category. This category received a "Transformational" rating, reflecting DTO platforms' potential to fundamentally change how organizations operate. Corporater's platform is designed for connected governance across strategy, performance, risk, and compliance, enabling reliable AI and improved decision-making.

feed.title: Amazon's AWS Bets $1 Billion on New AI Engineering Unit Built Around a Strategy Palantir Pioneered More Than a Decade Ago
feed.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is investing $1 billion into a new Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) unit to help customers integrate and operationalize artificial intelligence systems. This FDE concept, where engineers work directly with clients to accelerate technical transformation, was pioneered by Palantir Technologies over ten years ago. Additionally, AWS launched a managed service for classified defense workloads and an accelerator program to support its adoption.

feed.title: People Moves: AIG Hires Bewlay From AXA Group to Become Global CUO
feed.summary: Nancy Bewlay is set to become American International Group's new global chief underwriting officer, having previously served as group chief underwriting and pricing officer at AXA Group. She will report to AIG President and CEO Eric Anderson, overseeing the company's underwriting strategy and best practices. Her appointment follows a leadership transition at AIG, with Eric Anderson taking over as President and CEO from Peter Zaffino.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE LAUNCHES SEASON 6 OF "THE ANGLE" PODCAST SERIES WITH INVESTOR-FOCUSED LOOK AT AI ADOPTION
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has launched the sixth season of its podcast series, "The Angle," focusing on artificial intelligence adoption and its impact on the economy and investments. Titled "AI at Work: From Promise to Impact," the season features T. Rowe Price investment professionals dissecting the long-term value, market expectations, and societal changes driven by AI. Episodes will cover topics such as AI's transformation of the competitive landscape, physical AI, agentic AI's implications for hardware and software, AI's macroeconomic effects, and AI-driven value creation outside the tech sector.

feed.title: Best 4th of July furniture sales for 2026: The best deals from Wayfair, The Home Depot, Frontgate, Walmart and more
feed.summary: Retailers like Wayfair, The Home Depot, Frontgate, Walmart, and Amazon are offering significant discounts on furniture, including patio sets, indoor furniture, and accessories, ahead of the Fourth of July holiday in 2026. Deals include up to 50% off at Wayfair, summer savings at The Home Depot, up to 70% off sitewide at Frontgate, and various furniture deals starting at $100 at Walmart and Amazon. Shoppers can find sales on items ranging from patio conversation sets and dining sets to grills, vanity sets, and computer desks.

feed.title: Piper Sandler raises Illumina stock price target on clinical strength
feed.summary: Piper Sandler increased its price target for Illumina (NASDAQ:ILMN) to $200 from $170, maintaining an Overweight rating, based on the company's strong clinical business momentum and dominance in the genomics market. The firm highlighted Illumina's NovaSeq X system, which accounts for 90% of high-throughput gigabases shipped, enabling clinical-scale multiomics. This shift towards high-quality, reimbursed clinical consumables, which grew 20% year-over-year in Q1 2026, is seen as decoupling Illumina's growth from the volatile academic research market.

feed.title: ADP Reports Job Growth at 98K for June, Missing Expectations
feed.summary: The U.S. private sector added 98,000 jobs in June, falling below the expected 117,000 and the previous month's 122,000, according to the ADP National Employment Report. This slower job growth may impact economic recovery and consumer spending, and is particularly relevant for Automatic Data Processing Inc (ADP). Despite the slowdown, ADP maintains a strong GF Score™ of 87/100, driven by high profitability and growth, alongside a moderate P/E ratio of 20.89.

feed.title: ICE plans GPU compute futures with NATIVX’s COIL index
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced its plan to launch cash-settled, U.S. dollar-denominated GPU compute futures contracts. These contracts will be based on NATIVX’s COIL Index, which tracks tokenized, energy-normalized compute and connectivity prices. The initiative aims to provide price discovery and hedging opportunities for GPU exposure, complementary to ICE's existing energy futures.

feed.title: Federal Realty appoints Paige Pitcher as SVP of digital innovation
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President, Digital Innovation, a new role focusing on leading the company's AI and technology strategy. Pitcher brings over 15 years of experience in real estate and technology, previously working at Bigger Pitcher Advisory and Hines. This appointment follows impressive Q1 2026 results for Federal Realty and positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Regeneron among 7 companies picked for FDA PreCheck pilot program
feed.summary: The FDA has selected seven companies, including Eli Lilly and Regeneron, to participate in its new PreCheck pilot program, which provides early technical guidance for new U.S. pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities. This initiative was prompted by a 2025 presidential order to promote domestic drug production. The selected companies each have one specific site entering the program, with facilities spanning Indiana, New York, North Carolina, and New Jersey, aiming to boost the domestic manufacturing of various pharmaceutical products, including APIs, sterile injectables, and cell-based gene therapies.

feed.title: Coca-Cola, Shadrachs Coffee to Serve Guests at First Community Bank Sportsplex
feed.summary: The First Community Bank Sportsplex in Jonesboro, Arkansas, has announced partnerships with Coca-Cola and Shadrachs Coffee to be the official beverage providers for the new sports and wellness facility. Coca-Cola will offer a wide range of non-alcoholic drinks, while local brand Shadrachs Coffee will provide brewed and iced coffee in the facility's cafe and concession areas. These partnerships aim to enhance the guest experience with both globally recognized and local options as the Sportsplex prepares for its grand opening.

feed.title: Intrusion Inc. Announces Technology Showcase Highlighting the Combined Power of TraceCop and VigilAigent's AI Platform
feed.summary: Intrusion Inc. will host a Technology & Innovation Day on July 22, 2026, to showcase its new AI-native cybersecurity platform, combining TraceCop and VigilAigent's AI. The event will feature live demonstrations and discussions on how their integrated technologies identify, prioritize, and respond to cyber threats in near real-time. This aims to highlight significant commercial opportunities for enterprises and managed service providers.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment stock leans on its core casino business
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment (CZR) continues to focus on its core casino and hotel business in the U.S., complemented by digital wagering. The company's business model is built on regional casinos, destination resorts, and its loyalty program, Caesars Rewards, which also integrates with Caesars Sportsbook. Key factors for investors include margin discipline, digital betting economics, and cash generation.

feed.title: Intrusion Inc. Announces Technology Showcase Highlighting the Combined Power of TraceCop and VigilAigent's AI Platform
feed.summary: Intrusion Inc. (NASDAQ:INTZ) will host a Technology & Innovation Day on July 22, 2026, to showcase its new AI-native cybersecurity platform, a result of combining TraceCop cyber intelligence with VigilAigent's autonomous AI platform. The event will feature live demonstrations and discussions on product roadmaps, focusing on how this integration enhances real-time threat detection and response for enterprises and managed service providers. Executive leaders from both companies will present the platform's capabilities and commercial opportunities.

feed.title: BlackRock vs. Invesco: Financial Giants Face Off on Revenue Growth and Stability
feed.summary: This article compares the revenue growth and stability of BlackRock and Invesco, two financial giants. While BlackRock demonstrates higher revenue generation and significant, though volatile, growth, Invesco maintains a steadier revenue trend. The analysis highlights BlackRock's larger overall footprint and greater revenue growth percentage over the last eight quarters compared to Invesco's more stable but slower growth.

feed.title: Why Is FactSet Stock Falling Wednesday? - FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS)
feed.summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE: FDS) stock declined in premarket trading despite exceeding Q3 earnings and revenue estimates. Investors reacted to a decline in operating margin and flat fiscal 2026 guidance, which signaled limited upside. The company, however, continues to expand its AI capabilities through a partnership with Alphabet Inc.'s (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) Google Cloud.

feed.title: MetLife Investment Management names Chris Aiken real estate head By Investing.com
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management has appointed Chris Aiken as the new head of Real Estate Equity Strategies, effective immediately. Aiken will oversee the firm's direct property investment platform for MetLife's general account and third-party institutional investors, managing a real estate portfolio that was valued at $106.2 billion as of March 31, 2026. This appointment follows other recent strategic developments at MetLife, including strong first-quarter earnings and new product features.

feed.title: Amex wants to help the restaurant industry fix one of its biggest problems—and it isn't food costs
feed.summary: American Express and Resy are launching a national leadership academy, in partnership with the National Restaurant Association Educational Foundation, to help restaurant owners and managers develop essential business skills. This four-month program aims to address the critical need for better management and financial expertise in the restaurant industry. The initiative comes as restaurants face significant challenges including elevated food costs, labor shortages, and more discerning consumers, emphasizing that strong leadership is crucial for profitability and navigating a complex business environment.

feed.title: Visa (NYSE: V) CEO sells 20,970 shares in Rule 10b5-1 trade
feed.summary: Visa CEO Ryan McInerney reported an exercise and sale of 20,970 shares of Class A Common Stock. The shares were acquired through employee stock options at $109.82 per share and then sold in an open-market transaction at a weighted average price of $340.2464 per share, as part of a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these transactions, McInerney directly holds 15,174 shares and indirectly holds 265,168 shares through a trust.

feed.title: Invesco schedules July 28 call for Q2 2026 results
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 28, 2026. The earnings materials will be posted on the company's Investor Relations website around 7 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call and webcast at 9 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The company also provided details for accessing the live call and subsequent audio replay.

feed.title: CoStar Group (CSGP) Fell Despite Solid Results
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) shares fell despite the company reporting solid Q4 2025 results and reiterating 2026 guidance, as net new bookings were slightly below buy-side expectations. TimesSquare Capital U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy noted the company's strong core business trends and accelerating profitability but highlighted a 40% stock tumble in the quarter. Despite 62 hedge funds holding CSGP, the firm suggests other AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: TimesSquare Mid Cap Growth Strategy Exited HubSpot (HUBS) Due to AI Disruption Concerns
feed.summary: TimesSquare Capital Management's Mid Cap Growth Strategy exited its position in HubSpot (HUBS) during the first quarter of 2026, citing concerns over potential AI disruption and challenges to HubSpot's seat-based model. The software company's stock experienced a significant decline of 43% before the sale. While acknowledging HubSpot's risks, the strategy suggests that other AI stocks offer greater potential for higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Which 2026 Honda Civic Should You Buy? Every Trim Explained
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive guide to the 2026 Honda Civic lineup, detailing each trim level from the entry-level LX to the high-performance Type R. It highlights the features, pricing, and target audience for each variant, including the efficient Sport Hybrid and the enthusiast-focused Si. The author ultimately recommends the Sport Hybrid as the best balance of features, power, and fuel economy for most buyers, while acknowledging the Type R for track enthusiasts.

feed.title: Cloud Capital seeds data center venture with over $6B in assets
feed.summary: Cloud Capital has established a Core Joint Venture Strategy with Realty Income and a global institutional investor, valued at over $6 billion. This venture will focus on stabilized hyperscale data centers with long-term triple-net leases in the U.S. and Europe. The initiative leverages Cloud Capital's integrated platform and aims to capitalize on increasing demand for cloud and AI applications.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group’s Q2 results land July 27; call follows July 28
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (Nasdaq: PFG) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after U.S. markets close on Monday, July 27, 2026. A live conference call will be held on Tuesday, July 28, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET, featuring Deanna Strable and Joel Pitz. Additional information, including the earnings release, supplement, and slides, will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Gartner Predicts 20% of Finance Organizations Will Pivot All Talent-related Investments to Advanced Digital Capabilities by 2028
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, 20% of finance organizations will reallocate all talent investments toward advanced digital capabilities, stopping the hiring and development of non-digitally literate talent. This shift is driven by the increasing integration of AI in finance, prompting CFOs to focus on building sophisticated technical skills within their existing digitally literate workforce. The move will lead to significant changes in finance roles, hiring practices, and employee development, with a strong emphasis on continuous digital upskilling and a potential decrease in traditional finance positions.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin to webcast Q2 results before market opens July 23
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) announced it will host a live webcast of its second-quarter 2026 earnings results conference call on Thursday, July 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The earnings results, slides, and financial charts will be posted before market open that day. A replay of the webcast will be available through August 6, 2026.

feed.title: Uncrustables® Sandwiches Are Now Fridge Friendly Nationwide: Buy Them Frozen. Store Them Your Way -- In Your Fridge or Freezer at Home
feed.summary: Uncrustables sandwiches are now "fridge friendly" nationwide, allowing consumers to store them in the refrigerator for up to five days for immediate enjoyment, or keep them frozen for longer. The J.M. Smucker Co. announced this change in response to consumer demand for greater convenience. The product itself, including the recipe and "Unbeatably Soft Bread," remains the same and will continue to be sold in the freezer aisle.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Conference Call
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) announced it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, before trading opens. A conference call to discuss these results and the company's outlook will be held at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, with an online webcast available at ir.odfl.com. The webcast and a telephonic replay will be available for approximately 30 days and one week, respectively, after the call.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Plans Trump Account Match for Eligible Employees’ Children
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton announced plans to match the U.S. government's $1,000 contribution to "Trump Accounts" (Section 530A accounts) for eligible children of its U.S. employees. This new benefit aims to help families build long-term financial security by encouraging early savings and investment for children born between 2025 and 2028. CEO Jenny Johnson highlighted the firm's commitment to financial wellness and creating a financial foundation for the next generation.

feed.title: P&G to Webcast Discussion of Fourth Quarter 25/26 Earnings Results on July 29
feed.summary: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE: PG) announced it will webcast a discussion of its fourth-quarter earnings results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors and media can access the live audio webcast, and subsequent replay, on the company's investor website. This announcement provides key information for stakeholders interested in P&G's financial performance.

feed.title: MetLife Investment Management Names Chris Aiken Head of Real Estate Equity Strategies
feed.summary: MetLife Investment Management (MIM) has appointed Chris Aiken as the new head of Real Estate Equity Strategies. Aiken will lead MIM’s direct property investment platform and oversee investing activities for MetLife’s general account and third-party institutional investors across various real estate strategies. This appointment follows Andrea Drasites' promotion to global head of Real Estate and Agricultural Finance, showcasing MIM's continued investment in its real estate capabilities and leadership team.

feed.title: What to Expect From Huntington Bancshares' Q2 2026 Earnings Report
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) is anticipated to announce its Q2 2026 earnings before the market opens on July 23rd. Analysts project an adjusted EPS of $0.39, a 2.6% increase year-over-year. The bank's stock has lagged the S&P 500 but outperformed the State Street Financial Select Sector SPDR ETF over the past year, with a "Strong Buy" consensus rating and a potential upside of 12.2%.

feed.title: ISG finds companies want one system for hiring and reviews
feed.summary: A new report from Information Services Group (ISG) indicates that enterprises are seeking unified platforms for talent recruitment and employee performance management. This shift is driven by a desire to integrate AI-enabled talent operations with strong governance and transparency, aiming to improve business outcomes, candidate experiences, and reduce operational friction. The 2026 ISG Buyers Guides for Talent evaluate 31 software providers, highlighting Oracle as a top overall leader in both recruiting and performance management suites due to the increasing demand for comprehensive, integrated solutions.

feed.title: AI, cloud drive Verizon/BT Group joint venture
feed.summary: Verizon and BT Group have formed a 50-50 joint venture, combining their international holdings into an entity focused on a "cloud-first world in the age of AI." This new venture is expected to serve over 3,000 customers in more than 180 countries, with combined annual revenues of approximately $4 billion. The collaboration aims to maximize revenue from international endeavors for both companies while maintaining focus on their domestic markets.

feed.title: Federal Realty Appoints Paige Pitcher to Lead AI and Digital Innovation Strategy
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust has appointed Paige Pitcher as Senior Vice President of Digital Innovation, a new executive role focused on integrating AI and digital technologies across the company's operations. Pitcher will lead the applied AI and technology strategy to improve speed, efficiency, and decision-making in leasing, operations, and investment activities. This move highlights a growing trend among real estate companies to leverage digital tools for enhanced performance and competitive differentiation.

feed.title: Marriott Makes Coca-Cola New Global Beverage Partner
feed.summary: Marriott International has partnered with The Coca-Cola Company to make it their new global beverage partner. This agreement will introduce Coca-Cola's wide range of beverages across Marriott's hotels worldwide, including guestrooms, restaurants, lounges, and event spaces. The phased rollout of these products began on Wednesday and will continue globally in the coming months.

feed.title: T Stamp Inc (IDAI) director awarded 1,582 Class A share-based units
feed.summary: T Stamp Inc. director Charles Edward Potts was granted 1,582 derivative awards on Class A Common Stock on June 30, 2026, as reported in a recent Form 4 SEC filing. These compensation-related awards, with a conversion price of $0.00 per share, increase his direct holdings to 19,853 shares or equivalents. The transaction is categorized as a grant or acquisition rather than a market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Fluke 117 Electrician’s Multimeter from Fortive Corp. - Compact tool built for US job sites
feed.summary: The article reviews the Fluke 117 Electrician’s Multimeter, a compact and safety-rated tool designed for professional electricians and maintenance crews in the US. Manufactured by Fortive Corp., the multimeter features non-contact voltage detection (VoltAlert), true RMS measurement, and low-input impedance (LoZ), making it suitable for practical, one-handed use on typical US job sites. It is positioned as a reliable, mid-to-high-range instrument within Fortive's broader test and measurement portfolio, supporting recurring revenue from trade professionals.

feed.title: Baird initiates Abbott stock coverage with Outperform rating
feed.summary: Baird has initiated coverage on Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) with an Outperform rating and a price target of $121, indicating a 33% upside. The firm anticipates steady 6-8% top-line and earnings growth for Abbott, driven by its strong medical devices business and strategic integrations. Abbott is considered undervalued, a prominent player in its industry, and has consistently raised its dividend for 12 years.

feed.title: Loews Corp (L) director receives 223-share quarterly stock grant under 2025 plan
feed.summary: Loews Corp director Charles D. Davidson received a quarterly grant of 223 shares of common stock under the company's 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan. This transaction, awarded at no purchase price as part of director compensation, brings his total direct holdings to 29,285.6 common shares. The filing indicates a "grant, award, or other acquisition" transaction, not a market buy or sale.
